fields.label: Active
fields.rationale: Default to active. A Workflow only governs its target DocType when is_active=1; Frappe allows only ONE active workflow per DocType, so check has_active_workflow first before creating a second.

fields.label: Override status
fields.rationale: Leave off unless you want the workflow state to replace Frappe's native status field. Most workflows run alongside native status.

fields.label: Send email on state change
fields.rationale: Enables built-in email-on-transition. Default off; prefer a dedicated Notification with richer templating unless the user explicitly wants basic alerts.
